Uses of Class
oshi.metrics.OshiMetrics.Builder

  • Uses of OshiMetrics.Builder in oshi.metrics

    Methods in oshi.metrics that return OshiMetrics.Builder
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.builder(HardwareAbstractionLayer hal, OperatingSystem os)
    Creates a new builder for selective metric registration.
    static OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.builder(SystemInfoProvider si)
    Creates a new builder for selective metric registration.
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enableContainer(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable container metrics (cpu time, memory usage/available).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enableCpu(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable CPU metrics (time, frequency, counts).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enableDisk(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable disk metrics (io, operations, io_time, limit).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enableFileSystem(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable filesystem metrics (usage, utilization, limit).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enableGeneral(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable general metrics (uptime, process count).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enableMemory(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable memory metrics (usage, limit, utilization).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enableNetwork(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable network metrics (io, packets, errors, connections).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enablePaging(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable paging/swap metrics (usage, utilization, operations).
    OshiMetrics.Builder
    OshiMetrics.Builder.enableProcess(boolean enabled)
    Enable or disable current process metrics (cpu, memory, disk, threads, faults, uptime).
